creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Sorry this has taken so long, this pr for a new port is > 12 months old. 
Do you still want this added to FreeBSD ports collection? 
Is there a newer version available? 
(I can submit this original and you can update it, or you can send a new shar attached as a followup) 

Let me know.
